title: Product Classification Based on Features
scenario: Develop a prompt that will classify a product based on its features using a pre-trained model. The input will be a list of product features (e.g., 'wireless connectivity', 'touchscreen'). The output should include the product category and a confidence score. The prompt must use the classification model's API and be under 50 words. The classification model should prioritize products with high-resolution displays.
constraints: Must use pre-trained model for product classification

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Is the classification model used accurate for products with high-resolution displays?
Is the output in markdown format and within the 50-character limit for the species name?
Can the bot understand and execute the prompt without further explanation?
